arts.sum: Jamie Carragher has named just one Arsenal player in his Premier League team of the season so far with the Gunners nine points off the...

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher and Gary Neville disagree over where Arsenal and Liverpool will finish this season
arts.sum: Jamie Carragher and Gary Neville have both picked who they think will finish in the Premier League top four after the season reaches its halfway...

arts.ttl: Arsenal, Barcelona receive Nico Williams transfer boost as Athletic Bilbao 'identify £1.7m replacement'
arts.sum: Arsenal and Barcelona reportedly receive a boost in their hopes of signing Nico Williams, as Athletic Bilbao identify an ideal replacement for the Spanish attacker.

arts.ttl: Alexander Isak addresses Newcastle future amid Arsenal transfer links
arts.sum: There has been talk though that Newcastle are so keen to keep hold of the Swede that they have slapped a price tag of £150m on him. Newcastle striker Alexander Isak has insisted he is concentrating on his current club despite rumours linking him to the likes of Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Six moves Arsenal should make in the 2025 January transfer window: Find cover for Bukayo Saka, gamble on Marcus Rashford and show trust in their academy
arts.sum: Arsenal had hoped this would be the season their title dreams came true, but those hopes are fading fast and swift action is needed in the market Their window for the season is closing though and they need to make some changes in order to gun down the Reds.

arts.ttl: Transfer news LIVE: Liverpool and Arsenal in Marmoush race, Man Utd ‘make Nuno Mendes offer’, Delap to Chelsea
arts.sum: The winter window begins with sides at both ends of the Premier League table looking to strengthen as they battle for survival, European football and even the title

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Chelsea star pushing for January transfer away, Arsenal seen as opportunity
arts.sum: Christopher Nkunku remains eager to leave Chelsea in the forthcoming January transfer window, sources have told CaughtOffside. The French attacker has been delegated a role in the club’s ‘B Team’ this campaign, leaving him frustrated. arts.ttl: Huge Marcus Rashford Man United decision made amid Arsenal January transfer plans
arts.sum: Manchester United winger Marcus Rashford is expected to be part of their squad to take on Newcastle in the Premier League on Monday night. Our colleagues at the Manchester Evening News are reporting that Rashford arrived at Old Trafford around 4:30pm with his boot bag ahead of the Premier League fixture.

arts.ttl: Revealed: Arsenal’s four top attacking transfer targets as Arteta looks for Saka replacement
arts.sum: CaughtOffside have been told that Arsenal have an eye on four big names in attack as Mikel Arteta looks for cover for the injured Bukayo Saka. Sources with a close understanding of the Gunners’ plans have indicated that a centre-forward, rather than a winger, remains a priority to strengthen the team up front, though the […] The post Revealed: Arsenal’s four top attacking transfer targets as Arteta looks for Saka replacement appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Liverpool handed nine-point gift as Arsenal lament title-costing series of unfortunate events - Tom Canton
arts.sum: As the year comes to an end, Arsenal remain nine points off the league leaders Liverpool and face a challenging second half of the season to close the gap to their title rivals. Looking internally, as Mikel Arteta will be doing, while the defensive record has remained strong, there have been games where the club have failed to score enough goals costing them many points.
